name: Cuttlefish Mix
steps: Dice down the squid to help it blend.
Blend the prawns and squid down in batches with a little water if needed to help get it smooth.
Place a little amount of the puree back into the thermo with the rest of the ingredients apart from the egg whites with a little more puree on top to help blend.
Place everything into Kitchen aid mixing bowl and mix until combined.
More squid ink may need to be added to get the right colour.

other_details.notes: Make sure the mix doesn’t get too warm during the blending process.
